name: sux-mail
description: Registers the personal Fastmail MCP connector (/mail/mcp): search/read/thread mail, compose drafts, send, archive/move, masked-email — ergonomic tools that compile to JMAP — plus the raw `jmap` conduit escape hatch for the whole protocol (calendars, contacts, custom methods). Same Worker, same OAuth (login-gated); a focused namespace kept SEPARATE from the universal `sux` connector. Needs FASTMAIL_TOKEN set on the Worker; degrades to a clear not-configured message otherwise.
